stories.title: AUSL Play-in — Tomorrow Night: Bandits vs. Cascade (CORRECTION from July 21)
stories.angle: The Cascade is an expansion team in its first year. They beat both playoff teams during the regular season. They sneaked into the postseason on the last day. And now they face the Bandits again Thursday in a win-or-go-home game.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tomorrow night at Davis Diamond.

No. 2 Chicago Bandits (16-9) vs. No. 3 Portland Cascade (14-11).

July 23. 9 PM ET on ESPN.

These two teams already played this season. Cascade won 5-4 and snapped the Bandits' 9-game win streak. #AUSL #softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant enters Thursday as the AUSL's second-leading home run hitter.

10 HRs this season. 313-ft debut blast. 42 NCAA record-setting HRs this spring.

Portland Cascade clinched the play-in spot on the last possible day. Now they face the Bandits again. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: The Play-in Matchup Changed. Here's What You Need to Know About the Actual Game.

stories.title: PGF Nationals — Bracket Play Tightening, Championships Friday
stories.angle: Every game from here is a recruiting showcase with broadcast stakes on the other side. The field is nearly decided.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals bracket play is deep into its final stretch.

Win-or-go-home. Five SoCal venues. 300+ teams from 34 states.

Championships on ESPNU and ESPN+ on Friday. September 1 — when D1 coaches can contact Class of 2028 recruits — is 40 days away. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: Two Days to the Championship. Forty Days to September 1. This Is the Week That Decides It All.

stories.title: Portland Cascade's Cinderella Postseason — An Expansion Team That Beat Everyone
stories.angle: The Cascade beat both possible opponents during the regular season. Expansion team or not, they are the most dangerous No. 3 seed the AUSL has ever had.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Portland Cascade is in the AUSL play-in for one reason: they beat everyone.

They snapped the Bandits' 9-game win streak 5-4 on July 12. They run-ruled the Talons 10-2 on July 15.

Now they face the Bandits again Thursday. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: The AUSL's Most Dangerous Expansion Team Just Made the Postseason. They Already Beat Both Other Clubs.

stories.title: Maya Brady Sets AUSL HR Record — Then Watches Her Season End
stories.angle: The record came in defeat, in an elimination game that ended by run rule. That detail is the story.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Maya Brady hit her 11th home run on Tuesday morning.

It set a new AUSL single-season record.

It was also in the bottom of the 5th inning of the Spark's elimination loss. The Blaze beat them 11-1 by run rule.

The record lives. The season doesn't. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Maya Brady Now Owns the AUSL Home Run Record. She Set It in the Bottom of the 5th of an Elimination Loss.

stories.title: AUSL Championship Week Preview — Talons, Davis Diamond, ABC on July 25
stories.angle: The Talons are the team waiting. The game they're watching on Thursday will determine who they face — and whether that team has already beaten them.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Utah Talons. Davis Diamond. July 25-27.

The No. 1 seed has been waiting. Montana Fouts went 7-4 with a 2.36 ERA and set the AUSL single-game K record (12) this season.

Game 1 of the Championship on ABC — the first pro softball game ever on network TV. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Utah Talons, Davis Diamond, and the ABC Broadcast: What Championship Week Looks Like
